author: doll-agent
content: Done. ferrolearn-bayes::conjugate::normal_normal landed: new src/conjugate.rs with NormalNormalPosterior struct and posterior_normal_normal free function. Closed-form precision-weighted update with empty-obs short-circuit and obs_var<=0 clipping. 8 unit tests + 4 proptest properties at 10000 cases each (40000 inputs verified). Doctest example. Cargo.toml description, keywords, categories updated to drop naive-Bayes-only framing. Adjacent: pre-existing tests/proptest_invariants.rs clippy::manual_range_contains fixed. cargo test -p ferrolearn-bayes -> 108 passed; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings -> clean. Consumable as path dep from qnd-trial-intel-rs.
